targets.rawSql: SELECT time, close as value FROM prices WHERE symbol = 'VOO' AND (granularity = 'daily' OR time >= CURRENT_DATE) AND $__timeFilter(time) ORDER BY time

SELECT time, symbol, close as value
FROM prices
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  AND symbol = 'VOO'
  AND (granularity = 'daily' OR time >= CURRENT_DATE)
ORDER BY time
